response.original_title: 100 Years of Route One: A Centennial Road Trip
response.overview: A NatGeo photographer turned a road trip on Maine’s Route 1 into a film ‘100 Years of Route One: A Centennial Road Trip’ by Bob Krist of Boothbay Harbor features sites and stories from Kittery to Fort Kent.
response.title: 100 Years of Route One: A Centennial Road Trip
